overview.description: Punitha Kanikkai Matha church is situated in the south end of Tamil Nadu in a village called Mathapuram, which is near the town of Karungal in Kanyakumari district, India, and belongs to the Roman Catholic Diocese of Kuzhithurai.

topPlaces.name: Pudukadai
topPlaces.description: Pudukadai is a panchayat town in Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Karungal
topPlaces.description: Karungal is a panchayat town in Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Thirunattalam
topPlaces.description: Thirunattalam, also called Nattalam, is a Panchayat town in Kanyakumari district in the Indian State of Tamil Nadu. It is located 4 km (2.5 mi) from Marthandam, 6 km (3.7 mi) from Karungal and 10 km (6.2 mi) from Thuckalay.

topPlaces.name: Thengapattanam
topPlaces.description: Thengapattanam (also referred to as "Thengapattinam", thennaipattinam" and "thenpattinam" ), named after dense coconut grooves, is a major trade and tourism centre in the painkulam panchayath along the coastal plains of Kanyakumari district. Thengapattanam, once part of Travancore and later Kerala, was added to Tamil Nadu on 1 November 1956 along with some parts of today's Kanniyakumari District.

topPlaces.name: Killiyur, Kanniyakumari
topPlaces.description: Killiyoor is a panchayat town in Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Killiyoor is one of the 6 taluks in the Kanniyakumari district.

topPlaces.name: Enayam Puthenthurai
topPlaces.description: Enayam is a village in Killiyoor Block, located within the Kanyakumari District of Tamil Nadu State of India.

topPlaces.name: Parthasarathy temple, Parthivapuram
topPlaces.description: Parthasarathy Temple, also spelled Parthasarathi Temple, is a 9th-century Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu in Kanyakumari district of Tamil Nadu, India. Spread over 2.5 acres, the temple is notable for the extensive records about it that have been discovered in Huzur Plates of Kollam.

topPlaces.name: Palapallam
topPlaces.description: Palapallam is a panchayat town in Kanniyakumari district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: Pudukadai is a panchayat town in Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Karungal is a panchayat town in Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

Thirunattalam, also called Nattalam, is a Panchayat town in Kanyakumari district in the Indian State of Tamil Nadu. It is located 4 km (2.5 mi) from Marthandam, 6 km (3.7 mi) from Karungal and 10 km (6.2 mi) from Thuckalay.

Thengapattanam (also referred to as "Thengapattinam", thennaipattinam" and "thenpattinam" ), named after dense coconut grooves, is a major trade and tourism centre in the painkulam panchayath along the coastal plains of Kanyakumari district. Thengapattanam, once part of Travancore and later Kerala, was added to Tamil Nadu on 1 November 1956 along with some parts of today's Kanniyakumari District.
Killiyoor is a panchayat town in Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Killiyoor is one of the 6 taluks in the Kanniyakumari district.
Enayam is a village in Killiyoor Block, located within the Kanyakumari District of Tamil Nadu State of India.

Parthasarathy Temple, also spelled Parthasarathi Temple, is a 9th-century Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu in Kanyakumari district of Tamil Nadu, India. Spread over 2.5 acres, the temple is notable for the extensive records about it that have been discovered in Huzur Plates of Kollam.
Palapallam is a panchayat town in Kanniyakumari district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Our Lady of Presentation Church, Mathapuram?
faq.a: The best time to visit Our Lady of Presentation Church, Mathapuram is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Our Lady of Presentation Church, Mathapuram?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (40 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (38 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Our Lady of Presentation Church, Mathapuram?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Our Lady of Presentation Church, Mathapuram at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Our Lady of Presentation Church, Mathapuram?
faq.a: Stays in Our Lady of Presentation Church, Mathapuram start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Our Lady of Presentation Church, Mathapuram?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pudukadai, Karungal, Thirunattalam, Thengapattanam, Killiyur, Kanniyakumari.
